title: Browser Attack Frequency Analysis (APM/OpenTelemetry)
description: Hunting query that performs frequency analysis on browser-based attacks detected via OCI APM. Identifies source IPs exhibiting multiple attack types against monitored applications, prioritizing multi-vector attackers.
query: 'Log Source' in ('enterprise-crm-portal', 'octo-drone-shop', 'SOC Application Logs') and ('HTTP URL' like '%3Cscript%' or 'HTTP URL' like '%UNION SELECT%' or 'HTTP URL' like '%UNION%20SELECT%' or 'HTTP URL' like '%javascript:%' or 'HTTP URL' like '%onerror=%' or 'HTTP URL' like '%document.cookie%' or 'HTTP URL' like '%SLEEP%' or 'HTTP URL' like '%DROP TABLE%' or 'HTTP URL' like '%coinhive%') | stats count as TotalAttempts, distinctcount('HTTP URL') as UniquePatterns, earliest(Time) as FirstSeen, latest(Time) as LastSeen by 'Client IP', 'service.name' | where TotalAttempts >= 3 | sort -TotalAttempts
